scripts.test: cd server && DB_PATH=:memory: JWT_SECRET=test-secret npm test
scripts.release: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v='psychic-'+Date.now();const s=fs.readFileSync('sw.js','utf8').replace(/const CACHE = '[^']+'/,\`const CACHE = '\${v}'\`);fs.writeFileSync('sw.js',s);console.log('Cache version set to',v);"
